title: Frequent 503 errors causing crashes
symptom: Users experience frequent 503 errors leading to crashes of the n8n instance, especially under load.
root_cause: Setting N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED to true is not recommended for production environments as it can lead to resource contention and instability, especially when not properly configured with worker instances and a queue manager.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED to false
Ensure the EXECUTIONS_MODE is set to 'queue' if using workers
Deploy Redis as the queue manager if using workers
agent_instruction: Change N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED to false and configure EXECUTIONS_MODE properly.
